handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `spo_`.
creating → refuse when caller is a tenant user AND `sports_registry_custom` entitlement is off (SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_DISABLED 402).

creating → refuse when caller is a tenant user AND slug matches an existing platform-seeded Sport (SPORT_KEY_COLLIDES_WITH_PLATFORM 422 — the observer scans for slug conflicts against tenant_id NULL rows).
creating → refuse when slug already exists on this tenant (SPORT_KEY_DUPLICATE 409 — partial unique index is the DB fallback).
creating → refuse when slug doesn't match `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$` (SLUG_INVALID_FORMAT 422).
creating → refuse when slug is in the reserved list ('platform', 'system', 'admin', 'seeded', 'default', 'any', 'all') (SLUG_RESERVED 422).
creating → refuse when category not in the enum (INVALID_SPORT_CATEGORY 422).
creating → refuse when gender_typical not in the enum (INVALID_GENDER_TYPICAL 422).
creating → refuse when age_range_min > age_range_max OR either outside 3..99 (INVALID_AGE_RANGE 422).
creating → refuse when icon set but doesn't match the Iconify identifier regex (ICON_INVALID_FORMAT 422).

creating → force is_platform_seeded=false when caller is a tenant user (SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_RESERVED — the flag is set only by the platform seeder). The observer silently overrides — no error, just enforcement.
creating → force tenant_id NULL when caller is a platform admin creating a platform Sport (via the platform route). Same silent override.

creating → consume 1 unit of the `sports_registry_custom_slot` entitlement when is_platform_seeded=false (throws SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_QUOTA_EXCEEDED 402 when exhausted). Platform seeded rows bypass — they are a platform invariant.
created → fire SportCreated (source='platform_seed' when created by the seeder, 'admin_created' when created via platform-admin route, 'tenant_custom' when created via tenant route).
created → fire TenantCustomSportCreated ADDITIONALLY when is_platform_seeded=false + tenant_id NOT NULL (separate signal for analytics).
created → invalidate the tenant's + platform catalog cache keys (sports:list:*, sports:full:{sport_id}, sports:resolve:*).
saving (slug changed) → REFUSE always (SLUG_IMMUTABLE 422 — downstream Wave 3 rows carry the slug as a string).
saving (is_platform_seeded changed) → REFUSE always (IS_PLATFORM_SEEDED_IMMUTABLE 403).
saving (tenant_id changed) → REFUSE always (TENANT_IMMUTABLE 422 — cross-tenant migration forbidden).
saving (category changed) → REFUSE for platform-seeded rows (platform categories are the taxonomy contract). Allowed on tenant customs but rare — audit-warn.
saving (any field on a platform-seeded row via tenant route) → REFUSE (platform rows are read-only on the tenant plane).

saving (is_active changed from true → false) → refuse when active Disciplines exist under this Sport (SPORT_HAS_ACTIVE_DISCIPLINES 409). Refuse when downstream Wave 3 references exist via the ReferenceCounter (SPORT_REFERENCE_IN_USE 409). Fire SportDeactivated with the downstream_reference_count as extra context.
saving (is_active changed from false → true) → allow unconditionally. Fire SportCreated variant if the row was fully archived; SportUpdated otherwise (with changed_fields=['is_active']).
updating (any other tracked field) → fire SportUpdated with `changed_fields` populated from `$model->getDirty()->keys()`.

deleting (hard-delete) → refuse when is_platform_seeded=true (PLATFORM_ROW_HARD_DELETE_FORBIDDEN 403). Refuse when Discipline children exist (SPORT_HAS_ACTIVE_DISCIPLINES 409). Refuse when downstream references exist (SPORT_REFERENCE_IN_USE 409). Only tenant customs with zero children AND zero downstream references may be hard-deleted; otherwise deactivate.
creating → populate ULID prefix `dis_`.
creating → refuse when caller is a tenant user AND `sports_registry_custom` entitlement is off (SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_DISABLED 402).

creating → resolve parent Sport via sport_id + verify tenant_id compatibility: parent Sport must be either platform-seeded (tenant_id NULL) OR belong to the caller's tenant. Cross-tenant parent refuses with CROSS_TENANT_REGISTRY_REFERENCE 422.
creating → refuse when slug already exists on this parent Sport (DISCIPLINE_KEY_DUPLICATE 409).
creating → refuse when caller is a tenant user AND slug matches an existing platform Discipline under the SAME sport_id (DISCIPLINE_KEY_COLLIDES_WITH_PLATFORM 422).
creating → refuse when slug doesn't match the regex (SLUG_INVALID_FORMAT 422).
creating → refuse when slug is in the reserved list (SLUG_RESERVED 422).
creating → refuse when format_type set but not in the enum (INVALID_FORMAT_TYPE 422).
creating → refuse when player_count_min > player_count_max OR either outside 1..500 (INVALID_PLAYER_COUNT_RANGE 422).
creating → force is_platform_seeded=false + tenant_id=caller's tenant when caller is a tenant user.
creating → consume 1 unit of `sports_registry_custom_slot` when is_platform_seeded=false.
created → fire DisciplineCreated.

created → fire TenantCustomDisciplineCreated ADDITIONALLY when tenant_id NOT NULL. Payload includes sport_is_platform_seeded so downstream analytics can distinguish 'custom Discipline under platform Sport' from 'custom Discipline under custom Sport'.
created → invalidate discipline cache keys.
saving (slug changed) → REFUSE (SLUG_IMMUTABLE 422).
saving (sport_id changed) → REFUSE (PARENT_REFERENCE_IMMUTABLE 422).
saving (tenant_id changed) → REFUSE (TENANT_IMMUTABLE 422).
saving (is_platform_seeded changed) → REFUSE (IS_PLATFORM_SEEDED_IMMUTABLE 403).
saving (any field on a platform-seeded row via tenant route) → REFUSE.

saving (is_active changed from true → false) → refuse when active Positions exist (DISCIPLINE_HAS_ACTIVE_POSITIONS 409). Refuse when downstream references exist (DISCIPLINE_REFERENCE_IN_USE 409). Fire DisciplineDeactivated.
saving (is_active changed from false → true) → refuse when parent Sport is is_active=false (a Discipline cannot be more-active than its parent).
updating → fire DisciplineUpdated.
deleting (hard-delete) → refuse when is_platform_seeded=true (PLATFORM_ROW_HARD_DELETE_FORBIDDEN). Refuse when Position children exist. Refuse when downstream references exist.
creating → populate ULID prefix `pos_`.
creating → refuse when caller is a tenant user AND `sports_registry_custom` entitlement is off (SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_DISABLED 402).
creating → resolve parent Discipline via discipline_id + verify tenant compatibility (platform-seeded parent OR same tenant). Cross-tenant refuses with CROSS_TENANT_REGISTRY_REFERENCE.
creating → refuse when slug already exists on this parent Discipline (POSITION_KEY_DUPLICATE 409).
creating → refuse when caller is a tenant user AND slug matches an existing platform Position under the SAME discipline_id (POSITION_KEY_COLLIDES_WITH_PLATFORM 422).
creating → refuse on slug regex + reserved list.
creating → refuse when typical_jersey_range_min > typical_jersey_range_max OR either outside 0..999.
creating → force is_platform_seeded=false + tenant_id=caller's tenant when caller is a tenant user.
creating → consume 1 unit of `sports_registry_custom_slot` when is_platform_seeded=false.
created → fire PositionCreated.
created → fire TenantCustomPositionCreated ADDITIONALLY when tenant_id NOT NULL.
created → invalidate position cache keys.
saving (slug changed) → REFUSE (SLUG_IMMUTABLE 422).
saving (discipline_id changed) → REFUSE (PARENT_REFERENCE_IMMUTABLE 422).
saving (tenant_id changed) → REFUSE (TENANT_IMMUTABLE 422).
saving (is_platform_seeded changed) → REFUSE (IS_PLATFORM_SEEDED_IMMUTABLE 403).
saving (any field on a platform-seeded row via tenant route) → REFUSE.
saving (is_active changed from true → false) → refuse when downstream references exist (POSITION_REFERENCE_IN_USE 409). Fire PositionDeactivated.
saving (is_active changed from false → true) → refuse when parent Discipline is is_active=false.
updating → fire PositionUpdated.
deleting (hard-delete) → refuse when is_platform_seeded=true. Refuse when downstream references exist.
